task1.title: Donate Unused Clothes
task1.description: Donate unused clothes to a charity or donation bin.
task1.reflection: How might this donation help someone in your community?

task2.title: Cook Without Food Waste
task2.description: Prepare a meal using only ingredients you already have at home.
task2.reflection: What food items did you save from going to waste today?

task3.title: Move Your Body
task3.description: Take a 20-minute walk or do light physical activity.
task3.reflection: How did your body or mood feel after this activity?

task4.title: Learn Something New
task4.description: Read at least 5 pages of an educational book or article.
task4.reflection: What new thing did you learn today?

task5.title: Support Gender Equality
task5.description: Share or display a message supporting gender equality.
task5.reflection: Why is gender equality important to you?

task6.title: Save Water
task6.description: Turn off the tap while brushing your teeth.
task6.reflection: How else could you reduce water use at home?

task7.title: Save Energy
task7.description: Turn off unused lights or unplug electronics.
task7.reflection: Which device do you often forget to turn off?

task8.title: Support a Local Business
task8.description: Buy something from or visit a local business.
task8.sdg: SDG 8 - Decent Work and Economic Growth
task8.reflection: Why did you choose this business today?

task9.title: Choose Reusable Items
task9.description: Use a reusable item instead of a disposable one.
task9.reflection: How often could you replace disposables with reusables?

task10.title: Help Someone
task10.description: Help someone in your community with a small act of support.
task10.reflection: How did this action impact someone else?

task11.title: Clean Your Neighborhood
task11.description: Pick up litter in your neighborhood or a public space.
task11.reflection: How did cleaning your area change how it looks or feels?

task12.title: Recycle an Item
task12.description: Recycle a plastic, glass, or paper item properly.
task12.reflection: What item do you throw away most often?

task13.title: Choose Low-Carbon Transport
task13.description: Walk, bike, or use public transport instead of a car.
task13.reflection: How could you reduce transport emissions more often?

task14.title: Avoid Single-Use Plastic
task14.description: Avoid using single-use plastic for the day.
task14.reflection: Which plastic item was hardest to avoid?

task15.title: Care for a Plant
task15.description: Water a plant or plant a seed.
task15.reflection: How does caring for plants benefit the environment?

task16.title: Practice Kindness
task16.description: Show an act of kindness or fairness to someone.
task16.sdg: SDG 16 - Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions
task16.reflection: How did this action affect your interaction with others?

task17.title: Work Together
task17.description: Complete a sustainability task with another person.
task17.reflection: How did working together make the task more meaningful?

task18.title: Learn About an SDG
task18.description: Learn one new fact about any Sustainable Development Goal.
task18.reflection: Which SDG interests you the most?

task19.title: Refill Instead of Buy New
task19.description: Refill a container instead of buying a new one.
task19.reflection: How can refill systems reduce waste?

task20.title: Use Natural Light
task20.description: Use natural light instead of artificial lighting during the day.
task20.reflection: How much energy could this save?

task21.title: Sort Household Waste
task21.reflection: What waste category surprised you most?

task22.title: Repair Instead of Replace
task22.description: Fix or repair something instead of throwing it away.
task22.reflection: How did repairing change how you value the item?

task23.title: Share Educational Content
task23.description: Share an educational post or fact with someone.

task24.title: Eat a Plant-Based Meal
task24.description: Eat at least one plant-based meal today.
task24.reflection: How did this choice impact the environment?

task25.title: Use a Reusable Shopping Bag
task25.description: Bring a reusable bag when shopping.
task25.reflection: How often do you remember reusable bags?
